quotes.text: Those who want respect, give respect.
All due respect, you got no idea what it's like to be Number One. Every decision you make affects every facet of every other thing.
A wrong decision is better than indecision.
Every day is a gift, but does it have to be a pair of socks?
You're only as good as your last envelope.
I'm like King Midas in reverse. Everything I touch turns to shit.
You probably don't even hear it when it happens, right? Just all of a sudden... you're not there.
Just when I thought I was out... they pull me back in.
Even a broken clock is right twice a day.
The sad truth is that most evil is done by people who never make up their minds to be good or evil.
It's good to be in something from the ground floor. I came too late for that and I know. But lately, I'm getting the feeling that I came in at the end. The best is over.
I find I have to be the sad clown: laughing on the outside, crying on the inside.
This is the most self-destructive man I have ever encountered.
We're soldiers. Soldiers don't go to hell. It's war. Soldiers, they kill other soldiers. We're in a situation where everyone involved knows the stakes.
You know, they say psychiatry and religion are two different roads to the same place.
My father was in it. My uncle was in it. Maybe I was too lazy to think for myself.
People only see what they want to see.
Big ears and a small mouth — that's a man's best asset.
You got any idea what my life would be worth if people found out I was seeing a psychiatrist?
I don't know where I'm gonna be in six months. I don't know where the world's gonna be. What do you want from me?
Sometimes I feel like I'm in a box. A small box. Can't breathe.
There are two endings for a guy like me — dead or in the can. Big percent of my friends are one or the other.
I'm a fat fuckin' crook from New Jersey.
You know, I work to keep this family together and I feel like nobody ever considers my needs.
You got a brain the size of a pineapple. I'm gonna use it for decoration.
